note: ADD A VIDEO BY GOOGLE DRIVE LINK — no need to upload the file anywhere. In Drive, share the file as 'Anyone with the link', copy the link, and paste it into a new item's "drive" field below (copy the example block). The thumbnail is pulled from Drive automatically. See README > 'Add a video from Google Drive'.

items.title: Plant Studio Landscape - Chamber Cup Event
items.description: Provided end-to-end video production for an event sponsored by Plant Studio Landscape. Responsibilities included on-site mobile cinematography to capture candid event footage, followed by full post-production editing to deliver a polished, engaging final promotional video.

items.title: Noah Bontrager - Cinematic Edit
items.description: Created a cinematic tribute video featuring runner Noah Bontrager by sourcing, curating, and compiling online footage. Handled all post-production, including pacing, sound design, and color grading, to craft a compelling visual narrative.

items.title: Pirates of the Caribbean Edit
items.description: Created a high-energy cinematic edit using sourced footage from the Pirates of the Caribbean franchise. Focused on dynamic pacing, seamless transitions, and precise audio synchronization to highlight the films' action sequences and characters.

items.title: the running effect.
items.description: Produced a dynamic running video using precise audio-visual synchronization and fast-paced transitions to capture the intensity and momentum of the sport.

items.title: FAST AND FURIOUS Edit
items.description: Created a high-octane cinematic edit using sourced footage from the Fast & Furious franchise, focusing on fast-paced transitions and dynamic audio synchronization to highlight the film's signature action and car sequences.

items.title: DON TOLVIER.
items.description: Created a stylized music video edit featuring artist Don Toliver, utilizing creative visual effects, seamless transitions, and precise audio synchronization to match the track's mood and rhythm.

items.title: Car Cinema Edit
items.description: Produced a high-end cinematic edit featuring stylized car footage, combining smooth camera tracking, dramatic lighting effects, and precise sound design to highlight the vehicles' performance and design.

items.title: Rendezvous.
items.description: Created a highly stylized fan edit set to Don Toliver and Yeat's track Rendezvous, utilizing creative visual effects and fast-paced transitions to match the song's energy and rhythm.

items.title: Sherlock Holmes Edit
items.description: Created a fast-paced cinematic edit using footage from the Robert Downey Jr. Sherlock Holmes films, highlighting the movies' stylized action sequences, quick-witted dialogue, and unique visual pacing.
